title: ToolTreaux Mini Hook and Pick Set Precision Cleaning and Hobby Tools - 4 Pieces
description:
The ToolTreaux versatile set of hooks and picks comes with 4 different tip types for a variety of precision and cleaning uses: angle hook, straight pick, full hook and 90 degree hook. These types of tools are ideal for accessing small and hard to reach spots like removing o-rings, cleaning and scratching. All of the tips of the hooks and picks are made of durable, hardened 40 HRC steel to improve the toughness and stability. This type of durable construction comes from a heat treatment process that will ensure a long service life so you can count on these tools through many projects. The hooks and picks feature soft, rubberized ergonomic grip handles that will provide comfort while preventing slippage to protect your hands during use

ToolTreaux Mini Hook and Pick Set Precision Cleaning and Hobby Tools - 4 Pieces

The ToolTreaux versatile set of hooks and picks comes with 4 different tip types for a variety of precision and cleaning uses: angle hook, straight pick, full hook and 90 degree hook. These types of tools are ideal for accessing small and hard to reach spots like removing o-rings, cleaning and scratching.

Key Features

  • 4 ASSORTED HOOKS AND PICKS - ToolTreaux set of hooks and picks comes with 4 different tips for a variety of precision and cleaning uses: straight pick, angle hook, full hook and 90 degree hook. Ideal tools for removing o-rings, scratching and cleaning hard to reach spots
  • HARDENED TIPS - Tips of all hooks and picks are made of durable, hardened 40 HRC to improve stability and toughness; durable construction with heat treatment ensures a long service life
  • SOFT GRIP HANDLE - Hooks and picks feature soft, rubberized ergonomic grip handles to provide comfort during use and prevent slippage to protect your hands. Handles come in high-visibility yellow to easily identify them in a dark tool box or storage case
  • VERSATILE TOOL SET - Use precision tools to pick through cables, access oil filter housing, replacing delivery valve seals, vinyl cutting and placing, hobby crafts, pottery, jewelry making and more
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: hardened 40 HRC steel, rubber, Colors: black, yellow, chrome; 4 tip types: straight, anle, full, 90 degree; Handle type; rubberized soft grip; Number of pieces included: 4

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TT4PCHKPKSET
  • UPC: 810058484154
  • Color: Yellow
  • Size: 4pc

All of the tips of the hooks and picks are made of durable, hardened 40 HRC steel to improve the toughness and stability. This type of durable construction comes from a heat treatment process that will ensure a long service life so you can count on these tools through many projects.

The hooks and picks feature soft, rubberized ergonomic grip handles that will provide comfort while preventing slippage to protect your hands during use. The handles come in a high-visiblity bright yellow color so you can easily identify them amongst your other tools in a dark tool box or storage case.

Pick and hook sets are great precision tools for a number of different applications and are especially useful for accessing oil filter housing, picking through cables safely, replacing delivery valve seals, vinyl cutting and placing, pottery, jewelry making and other hobby craft projects. This is a must-have variety of tools for any hobby or craft enthusiast!
